items.title: A reporter asked Mayor Mamdani about being called a cockroach and Mamdani reply: I am not ashamed of who I am. I am not ashamed of my faith. I am not ashamed of being the first Muslim mayor in the history of our city. And there’s no amount of racism that will change the way in which I lead
items.title_en: A reporter asked Mayor Mamdani about being called a cockroach and Mamdani reply: I am not ashamed of who I am. I am not ashamed of my faith. I am not ashamed of being the first Muslim mayor in the history of our city. And there’s no amount of racism that will change the way in which I lead
